节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Obtains traffic statistics.
Queries the data traffic (including all TCP and UDP data packets) received through a specified NIC.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - Returns the data traffic received through the specified NIC.
@throws { BusinessError } 2100002 - Failed to connect to the service.
@throws { BusinessError } 2103005 - Failed to read the system map.
@throws { BusinessError } 2103011 - Failed to create a system map.
@throws { BusinessError } 2103012 - Failed to obtain the NIC name.

parameters.说明: Network interface card.
Returns the data traffic received through the specified NIC.

error_codes.description: Parameter error.
Failed to connect to the service.
System internal error.
Failed to read the system map.
Failed to create a system map.
Failed to obtain the NIC name.

节点.功能描述: Detailed information of statistics.
Bytes of received.
Bytes of send.
Packets of received.
Packets of send.
Parameters for obtaining detailed information on specified network traffic usage.
Network type for querying traffic.
Start time for querying traffic.
End time for querying traffic.
SIM card id for querying traffic.
Get the traffic usage details of the specified network of the calling application in the specified time period and the specified networktype.
注释信息: @param { NetworkInfo } networkInfo - Information about the network to be queried.
@returns { Promise<NetStatsInfo> } The statistics of the calling application.
@throws { BusinessError } 2100002 - Failed to connect to the service.
@throws { BusinessError } 2103017 - Failed to read the database.
@throws { BusinessError } 2103019 - The timestamp in param is invalid.

parameters.说明: Information about the network to be queried.

节点.return_description: The statistics of the calling application.

error_codes.description: Invalid parameter value.
Failed to connect to the service.
System internal error.
Failed to read the database.
The timestamp in param is invalid.
